subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be illumined at all times by the radiant lights of the Countenance of the All-Merciful, and remain steadfast in thy gaze upon the horizon of the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در جمیع احیان از انوار وجه رحمن مستنیر باشی و بافق امر ناظر علی
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
